title: Fiery Australian Eggplant Gratin
description: A flavorful and spicy eggplant gratin recipe from Australia, featuring a hearty and aromatic combination of eggplant, fiery peppers, and creamy cheese.

ingredients.name: fiery
ingredients.notes: diced pepper, such as jalapeño or red pepper

instructions: In a large skillet, melt 1 tablespoon of butter over medium heat.
Add the sliced eggplant and cook until browned, about 5 minutes per side.
Transfer the eggplant to a baking dish.
In the same skillet, add the remaining 1 tablespoon of butter.
Add the diced pepper, minced garlic, and chopped onion. Cook until the vegetables are softened.
Stir in the canned tomatoes and chopped thyme.
Pour the tomato mixture over the eggplant.
Sprinkle the shredded cheese over the top.
Bake for 25-30 minutes, or until the cheese is melted and bubbly.
